# RavenDOS — Intelligence, Architected.

> RavenDOS is a product-driven technology studio based in Hyderabad, Telangana, India. We design, develop, and launch intelligent platforms across AI/ML, full stack development, DevOps, DevSecOps, app development, website design, and cybersecurity.

## Services

- AI & Machine Learning Development: Custom ML models, NLP, computer vision, generative AI, LLM integration, AI chatbots, predictive analytics, MLOps pipelines, AI automation
- Full Stack Development: Custom software, SaaS platforms, MVPs, MERN stack, React/Node.js, enterprise software, backend APIs, microservices, legacy modernization
- DevOps & Cloud Infrastructure: CI/CD pipelines, AWS/Azure/GCP, Kubernetes, Docker, Terraform, Infrastructure as Code, monitoring, cloud migration
- DevSecOps: Secure CI/CD pipelines, shift-left security, SAST/DAST integration, container security, compliance automation (SOC 2, ISO 27001, PCI-DSS)
- App Development: Cross-platform mobile apps (React Native, Flutter), progressive web apps, web apps (Next.js, React, Node.js), backend APIs
- Website Design & Development: Custom websites, Next.js, responsive design, SEO optimization, e-commerce, landing pages
- Network & Cyber Security: Cybersecurity services, penetration testing, vulnerability assessment, firewall management, zero-trust, SIEM/SOC, IAM, compliance (ISO 27001, SOC 2)

## Products

- IntiGrade (https://intigrade.in): AI-powered exam evaluation that bridges pen-and-paper tests with digital grading
- DiagnosticWale (https://diagnosticwale.com): India's trusted diagnostic platform connecting patients with labs

## Location

Hyderabad, Telangana 500059, India
